# Vendored PDF.js

These files are bundled so the viewer runs **fully offline** — no CDN / external
calls, so nothing about a filing ever leaves the machine.

- **Library:** Mozilla PDF.js
- **Version:** 3.11.174
- **Source:** https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/pdf.js/3.11.174/
- **Files:** `pdf.min.js`, `pdf.worker.min.js`
- **License:** Apache-2.0 (license notice retained in the file headers)

To upgrade, download the matching `pdf.min.js` + `pdf.worker.min.js` for the new
version, replace both files, and bump the version reference here.
